## Summary
Describe the user-facing and technical change.

## Why
Explain the problem this PR solves and why this is the right fix now.

## How to verify
- [ ] `apps/hub-api`: tests or manual verification noted
- [ ] `apps/assistant-runtime`: tests or manual verification noted
- [ ] `apps/mobile-app`: screenshots or flow notes included when relevant
- [ ] `apps/web-dashboard`: screenshots or flow notes included when relevant

## Risk
- [ ] Auth, token, or secret handling changed
- [ ] MQTT topic, command, or provisioning contract changed
- [ ] Database schema or migration changed
- [ ] Firmware compatibility changed

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated where the repo already has test coverage
- [ ] Docs updated for any changed runtime path or product flow
- [ ] No placeholder copy or fake workflow was introduced
